x-enumeration-literals.name: Repayment Scheduling
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks repayment schedules for loans, credit cards, or overdrafts, including installment amounts and due dates.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payment Processing
x-enumeration-literals.description: Accepts and processes customer repayments via multiple channels such as cash, transfer, direct debit, or online payment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest & Fee Allocation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Applies repayments to outstanding principal, interest, and any associated fees according to the product rules.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Overdue & Penalty Management
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identifies late payments and applies penalties, notifications, or escalation processes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Account Update & Reporting
x-enumeration-literals.description: Updates the customers account balance, loan ledger, and generates statements or regulatory reports.
